personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS Data Platform & AI/ML Pipeline Specialist

summary: AWS Data Engineer specializing in ML-enabled pipelines and scalable data platforms. With 20+ years of experience, I excel in building ETL pipelines with AWS (S3, Glue, Redshift), Python, and PySpark, while leveraging ML forecasting tools like Prophet and scikit-learn for advanced analytics.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines (Python/Pandas) ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing legacy manual processes.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform with S3 for raw telemetry, AWS Glue for ETL, and Redshift for ML forecasting workloads.
Developed ML forecasting models using Prophet and scikit-learn, achieving 90%+ accuracy in predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.
Migrated heavy ML workloads from on-prem Oracle to Redshift, enabling parallel forecasting at cloud scale.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS for scalable on-demand processing of capacity forecasting data.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems, ensuring data integrity.
Participated in cloud migration planning to AWS, evaluating tools for mobile monitoring and APM readiness.
Led data mining of performance metrics to provide optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed large-scale CA APM environments with 4,000–6,000 agents, ensuring robust data collection for analytics.
Built Perl/Ksh scripts for automated performance data extraction, replacing manual reporting processes.
Designed custom dashboards and alerts for performance monitoring, adopted as standards across client environments.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (S3, Glue, Redshift, Athena), PySpark, Apache Spark, Hive/Hadoop, Data Warehousing, ETL Design
skills.AI/ML: Prophet, scikit-learn, GenAI/LLM Agents, Time-Series Forecasting
skills.Tools & Infra: Airflow, Docker, Git, Linux/Unix, Streamlit, BMC TrueSight

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock, with a Text-to-SQL GenAI agent built on Claude 3 Sonnet, optimizing ETL for enterprise scale.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed an AI-driven forecasting engine with Python and PySpark, using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks with 90% cycle reduction.
